story_structure.title: Newport Hustle
story_structure.subtitle: A Mobile GTA-Style Adventure in Small-Town Arkansas
story_structure.theme: Finding your place in a community while building respect and success
story_structure.setting: Newport, Arkansas - A small river town with big personalities
story_structure.tone: Character-driven drama with humor and heart

main_arc.title: The Prodigal Returns
main_arc.description: Player returns to Newport and must rebuild their life and reputation

progression.character_development: Player reconnects with roots and faces past
Player demonstrates value and earns place in community
Player navigates competing interests and loyalties
Player takes leadership role and shapes Newport's future

progression.description: Helps player get established, shares wisdom
Provides resources and encouragement during challenges
Sees player succeed and steps back with pride
Opposes player's efforts, represents outside interests
Direct business competition and social rivalry
Revealed motivations make them more sympathetic

community_arc.description: Collective character representing Newport as a whole

progression.description: Community unsure about player's return and intentions
Community gives player chances to prove themselves
Community begins to trust and include player
Community fully accepts player as valued member and leader

reputation_path.description: Player's choices affect their reputation and standing in Newport

branches.name: Traditional_Respected
branches.condition: High respect with old-timers, traditional choices

branches.name: Modern_Innovator
branches.condition: High respect with new businesses, progressive choices

branches.name: Community_Bridge
branches.outcomes: Unifying leadership role bridging old and new Newport

branches.name: Outsider_Success
branches.condition: Business success despite low community respect

business_path.description: Player's business choices affect their role in Newport's economy

branches.name: Service_Professional
branches.condition: Focus on barbershop and personal services

branches.name: Wellness_Entrepreneur
branches.condition: Partner with spa and wellness businesses
branches.outcomes: Modern business owner bringing change to Newport

branches.name: Community_Organizer
branches.outcomes: Social leader with broad influence but moderate income

branches.name: Diversified_Mogul
branches.outcomes: Economic power and influence across all of Newport

community_vs_individualism.description: Balancing personal success with community responsibility
community_vs_individualism.exploration: Player must choose between personal gain and community benefit
community_vs_individualism.resolution: Best outcomes come from finding ways to succeed while helping others

tradition_vs_progress.description: Navigating change while respecting established ways
tradition_vs_progress.exploration: Tension between preserving Newport's character and embracing growth
tradition_vs_progress.resolution: Progress works best when it builds on rather than replaces tradition

redemption_and_second_chances.description: Everyone deserves opportunity to prove themselves
redemption_and_second_chances.exploration: Player and other characters overcome past mistakes or prejudices
redemption_and_second_chances.resolution: Growth comes through understanding, effort, and community support

small_town_complexity.description: Small towns have deep, complex social dynamics
small_town_complexity.exploration: Surface simplicity hides layers of history, relationships, and secrets
small_town_complexity.resolution: Understanding community complexity is key to belonging and success

real_elements.geography: White River, real street names, geographic accuracy
real_elements.culture: Arkansas small-town values, river culture, community traditions
real_elements.economy: Mix of traditional and modern businesses, tourism potential
real_elements.history: References to real Newport history and Arkansas heritage

fictional_elements.characters: All characters are fictional or placeholder pending consent
fictional_elements.businesses: Specific businesses are fictional but representative of real types
fictional_elements.events: Dramatic events are fictional but grounded in realistic scenarios
fictional_elements.scale: Compressed geography and accelerated timeline for gameplay

meaningful_choices: Whether to embrace tradition or drive change
What kind of leader to become

consequence_system.long_term: Different story endings and community outcomes

multiple_solutions.description: Most challenges have multiple valid approaches
examples: Barbershop conflict can be resolved through skill, diplomacy, or innovation
Spa secrets can be handled through exposure, protection, or mediation
Community leadership can be achieved through various specializations
